text.title: QA Test Strategy Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the feature large enough (≥2 weeks dev) that we need a documented test strategy?

text.example: Feature bulk-role-edit. Risks: r1 filter-ignored (S1), r2 N+1 perf (S2), r3 audit gap (S3). r1→integration+e2e (alice); r2→perf+integration (bob); r3→unit (carol). Out-of-scope: perf>1k rows (F-091). Exit: e2e=5 cases green, integration=2 cases green, perf=p95<500ms on 100 rows, unit=audit branches covered. Strategy committed at 720 words.
